creator: xistence@0x58.com
text:
\o/

With that latest patch:

iwm0: <Intel(R) Dual Band Wireless AC 3168> mem 0xba100000-0xba101fff irq 25 at device 0.0 on pci5
iwm0: hw rev 0x220, fw ver 22.361476.0, address 18:56:80:78:82:78
wlan0: Ethernet address: 18:56:80:78:82:78
wlan0: link state changed to UP

ifconfig wlan0 list channel
Channel   1 : 2412  MHz 11g          Channel  11 : 2462  MHz 11g
Channel   2 : 2417  MHz 11g          Channel  36 : 5180  MHz 11a
Channel   3 : 2422  MHz 11g          Channel  40 : 5200  MHz 11a

Channel   9 : 2452  MHz 11g          Channel 161 : 5805  MHz 11a
Channel  10 : 2457  MHz 11g          Channel 165 : 5825* MHz 11a

Although I am surprised they are all listed as 11g only, and no 11n. Also, it's missing all of the DFS channels, but I am guessing that is as expected.
